task: Launch-quality advanced task: Precision Assembly Tolerance Stack Digital Thread. Fit a simple linear or monotone relationship using only the embedded rows; flag records whose residual exceeds the supplied tolerance or reverses expected direction. Attribute tolerance contributors; convert the packet into an auditable evidence table, cite governing values, list unresolved assumptions, and mark any contradictory or under-supported record as needs_review. Deliver assembly_tolerance_stack.xlsx (with formulas or executable logic) and disposition.md (record-level citations, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final recommendation table suitable for expert review).
